_comment.name: AAS DTC Codes grabbed from Diagbox FDB. ECUTYPE union: AAS, AAS_MMC, AAS_UDS, AAS_UDS_G6. Conflicting labels resolved by majority vote across ECUTYPEs.

B1000.name: Parking assistance ECU calibration downloading fault

B1003.name: Parking assistance ECU secure configuration fault

B120E.name: Fault: internal combustion engine status information

B1218.name: Absence of a datastream from the ESP ECU

B1219.name: Fault in the electric power steering status information for the semi-automatic parking system

B121A.name: Loss of the electric vehicle system main status and direction indicators status information

B121C.name: Fault: loss of information coming from the Hybrid management ECU 1

B1221.name: Inner front left parking assistance sensor fault

B1222.name: Outer front left parking assistance sensor fault

B1223.name: Inner rear left parking assistance sensor fault

B1224.name: Outer rear left parking assistance sensor fault

B1225.name: Inner front right parking assistance sensor fault

B1226.name: Outer front right parking assistance sensor fault

B1227.name: Inner rear right parking assistance sensor fault

B1228.name: Outer rear right parking assistance sensor fault

B1242.name: Left-hand rear view mirror warning lamp fault

B1243.name: Right-hand rear view mirror warning lamp fault

B1244.name: Rear left lateral parking assistance sensor fault

B1245.name: Rear right lateral parking assistance sensor fault

B124A.name: Exterior mirror indicator lamps shared output fault

B1250.name: Front left lateral parking assistance sensor fault

B1251.name: Front right lateral parking assistance sensor fault

B125D.name: Semi-automatic parking system function selection button fault

B128E.name: The temperature of the parking assistance sensor is outside the range

B128F.name: Incoherence between the vehicle's physical direction of travel and the information received by the parking assistance ECU

B12A6.name: Error between the reference value of the steering wheel and the position of the steering wheel (Angular deviation too great)

C1001.name: Fault on the rear left exterior sensor circuit

C1002.name: Fault on the rear left interior sensor circuit

C1003.name: Fault on the rear right interior sensor circuit

C1004.name: Fault on the rear right exterior sensor circuit

C1005.name: Fault on the sensor common supply circuit.

U0100.name: No communication with the engine management ECU or with the electric drive train supervisor ECU

U0101.name: Fault - absence of communication with the gearbox ECU

U0121.name: No communication with electronic stability program (ESP) ECU

U0140.name: Absence of communication with the BSI

U0141.name: Fault: absence of communication with the Built-in Systems Interface

U0293.name: Absence of communication with the hybrid management ECU 1

U111D.name: Loss of datastream in the parking assistance ECU

U11A2.name: Absence of communication with the sequential gear lever

U1209.name: Absence of communication with the sequential gear lever

U1F03.name: Absence of communication with the BSI

U1F0F.name: Fault: ECU not communicating on the CAN

U1F18.name: Touch screen not communicating on the multimedia CAN

U1F25.name: No communication with the instrument panel

U1F2E.name: Absence of communication with the engine management ECU

U1F3E.name: Absence of communication with the telematic unit

U1F48.name: Fault: absence of communication with the ESP ECU

U1F49.name: Fault absence of communication with the electric power steering ECU

U1F5B.name: Absence of communication with the hybrid management ECU 1

U1F90.name: Loss of information from the built-in systems interface fault

U1F94.name: Loss of steering wheel angle sensor information fault

U1F95.name: Loss of driving direction information fault

U1F96.name: Loss of datastream in the parking assistance ECU

U1F9D.name: No communication with the parking assistance ECU

U1FBC.name: Loss of communication with the BSI

U1FBE.name: Check communication over the CAN network
